# Summary

## Row {height=25%}


::: {.cell content='valuebox' title='Total Cars'}

```{.r .cell-code}
list(icon = "car-front", color = "primary", value = nrow(mtcars))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
$icon
[1] "car-front"

$color
[1] "primary"

$value
[1] 32
```


:::
:::



::: {.cell content='valuebox' title='Avg MPG'}

```{.r .cell-code}
list(icon = "speedometer", color = "success", value = round(mean(mtcars$mpg), 1))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
$icon
[1] "speedometer"

$color
[1] "success"

$value

```


:::
:::

```{.r .cell-code}

```

```

$color

```


:::

::: {.cell content='valuebox' title='Avg Weight (tons)'}

```{.r .cell-code}

```

## Row {height=75%}


::: {.cell title='MPG vs Horsepower by Cylinder Count'}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = hp, y = mpg, color = cyl, size = wt)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = 1), method = "lm", se = TRUE,
              color = "#2563eb", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("4" = "#16a34a", "6" = "#ea580c", "8" = "#7c3aed"),
                     name = "Cylinders") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Weight (tons)", range = c(2, 7)) +
  labs(x = "Horsepower (hp)", y = "Miles Per Gallon (mpg)",
       caption = "Bubble size proportional to vehicle weight") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
`geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}

```
Warning: The following aesthetics were dropped during statistical transformation: size.
ℹ This can happen when ggplot fails to infer the correct grouping structure in
  the data.
ℹ Did you forget to specify a `group` aesthetic or to convert a numerical
  variable into a factor?
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Dashboard_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell title='MPG Distribution by Cylinders'}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = cyl, y = mpg, fill = cyl)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.shape = 21, outlier.size = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("4" = "#bbf7d0", "6" = "#fed7aa", "8" = "#ddd6fe")) +
  labs(x = "Number of Cylinders", y = "Miles Per Gallon (mpg)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Dashboard_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::


# Data Table

## Row


::: {.cell title='Summary Statistics by Cylinder Group'}

```{.r .cell-code}
mtcars |>
  group_by(Cylinders = cyl) |>
  summarise(
    N        = n(),
    Avg_MPG  = round(mean(mpg), 1),
    Avg_HP   = round(mean(hp), 1),
    Avg_Wt   = round(mean(wt), 2),
    Avg_Qsec = round(mean(qsec), 2),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) |>
  knitr::kable(
    col.names = c("Cylinders", "N", "Avg MPG", "Avg HP",
                  "Avg Weight (tons)", "Avg 1/4 Mile (sec)")
  )
```

::: {.cell-output-display}


|Cylinders |  N| Avg MPG| Avg HP| Avg Weight (tons)| Avg 1/4 Mile (sec)|
|:---------|--:|-------:|------:|-----------------:|------------------:|
|4         | 11|    26.7|   82.6|              2.29|              19.14|
|6         |  7|    19.7|  122.3|              3.12|              17.98|
|8         | 14|    15.1|  209.2|              4.00|              16.77|


:::
:::


## Row


::: {.cell title='Horsepower Distribution by Cylinders'}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = cyl, y = hp, fill = cyl)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("4" = "#16a34a", "6" = "#ea580c", "8" = "#7c3aed")) +
  labs(x = "Number of Cylinders", y = "Horsepower (hp)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Dashboard_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::
